problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Hydrogel. Hydrogel swelling/shrinking response directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The important thing is not to stop questioning. — Einstein
